title: GW32 Preview: Captain Picks, Differentials & One to AVOID
description:
Gameweek 32 preview powered by xG data. Captain picks backed by expected goals, two under-owned differentials, and one popular player the stats say you should sell. FPL Stats Lab — where the numbers do the talking.

#FPL #GW32 #FantasyPremierLeague #FPLTips #xG #FPLStats
thumbnailPrompt: Bold purple and white split design. Left side: Haaland and Bruno Fernandes action photos with green upward arrows. Right side: large 'GW32' text in white Anton font on purple background with glowing xG stat overlay. Bottom banner in yellow: 'CAPTAIN PICKS + DIFFERENTIALS'. Clean modern YouTube thumbnail, high contrast.
